assessment.note: He can follow current request paths, but missing historical context behind tradeoffs signals a mild remaining clarity gap.

new_queue.label: Tradeoff context
new_queue.name: Which tradeoffs feel hardest to understand the history behind?
new_queue.description: Drills into the specific missing historical context he just named.

new_queue.label: Context gaps
new_queue.name: What context are you still missing before you make bigger calls, Riley?
new_queue.description: Finds the places where he may be filling in gaps from docs instead of team norms.

new_queue.label: Ask early
new_queue.name: When you hit uncertainty, where do you go first for team context?
new_queue.description: Surfaces whether he has the right people and channels for getting unstuck quickly.

new_queue.label: Team contact
new_queue.name: Who have you had the most useful direct contact with so far, Riley?
new_queue.description: Shows whether his onboarding is still too doc-heavy and where relationships are thin.

new_queue.label: Support needed
new_queue.name: What would be most useful from me over the next couple of weeks, Riley?
new_queue.description: Converts missing context into a concrete manager support plan.

new_queue.label: Next-step landing
new_queue.name: Given what we've covered, what should we tighten up before our next check-in?
new_queue.description: Closes on concrete follow-up and keeps the meeting moving toward action.
